title: Doe CTS baseline policy
description: Thresholds and policy for CTS baseline regression detection.

maxNewFailures.description: Maximum number of new failures before the gate fails. 0 means zero-regression policy.

requireNoRegressions.description: When true, any test that was passing in baseline but fails in new run is a gate failure.

gateMode.description: Whether CTS baseline regression is a blocking or advisory gate.

notes.description: Human-readable notes about the current policy posture.

minSnapshots.description: Minimum number of snapshots required to compute a trend.

regressionWindowSize.description: Number of recent snapshots to consider for regression trend detection.
